event: three-host deploy — schema 60 -> 63 (docker native-state capture + the NQ-CLOSE-002 tombstones / EVIDENCE_RETIREMENT / ZFS-history arc) to all running instances; docker collector fleet rollout with per-host aggregator-first restart ordering
authorization: Operator endorsed ChatGPT's daylight order (aggregator-first, docker canary, fleet, then blackbox) — 'that order works for me. Let's kick it.' sushi-k + NAS (private) deployed under that go. VM (public) initially work-hours-gated; operator cleared it ('july 3 -- holiday for me. commit + push is fine') and gave explicit per-action go for the production deploy when the auto-mode classifier flagged the live binary-swap + schema migration.
deployed_commit: 38d0167 (origin/main HEAD, already pushed overnight); schema 60 -> 63 (migrations 061 evidence_tombstones, 062 sources_retired, 063 zfs_pools/spares_history — all additive, applied cleanly on every host: applying version=61,62,63 -> complete version=63).
schema_63_delta: Primary intent = docker native-state capture (9f04f7f): docker-checked services persist native state into service_observations under service_manager='docker', quoting docker's own vocabulary (active_state=State.Status, sub_state=State.Health.Status only when a HEALTHCHECK is declared; load_state/unit_file_state stay NULL — docker has no unit-load/enablement analog). Carried along (since last deploy was schema 60 on 2026-06-30): NQ-CLOSE-002 Slice A tombstones, EVIDENCE_RETIREMENT retirement verb + retired render/notify gating, ZFS 9-of-9 detectors + history tables, BASIS_STALE_CONTRACT v0.
topology_reconciliation: ChatGPT's 'aggregator deploy first, then collector' assumes a central-aggregator topology. NQ hosts are self-contained islands (own witness + own aggregator, same commit, same db). Reduced correctly to a per-host restart ordering: restart nq-serve (new ingest, recognizes service_manager='docker') BEFORE nq-publish (new witness emits docker-native rows) — so no docker row hits an old ingest and gets defaulted to systemd. Satisfied on all three hosts.

hosts.sushi-k: CANARY. local build (glibc 2.39, 36.1s). pre-migration db backup nq.db.bak-20260703T160530Z (schema 60 anchor) + new binaries -> ~/nq/rollback/pre-schema63-*. Aggregator-first: nq-serve restarted -> migrated 60->63 -> dash 200, THEN added governor-code-adapter check_type=docker to publisher.json -> nq-publish restarted. GREEN: active/active, dash 200, boundaries (not-incident-commander/not-proof-checker/cannot-testify) 1/1/3, leak 0. Docker worked-example row: service_manager=docker service_name=governor-code-adapter active_state=running sub_state=healthy load_state=NULL unit_file_state=NULL (exercises the 'healthy' collision path structurally — quoted sub_state, not a bare verdict; coarse findings 'up' unchanged). Systemd rows coexist correctly namespaced.
hosts.lil-nas-x: 192.168.69.10 (LAN). scp sushi-k binaries (glibc 2.39 match, no build) via .new + mv (ETXTBSY-safe). db + binaries backed up .pre-schema63-*. Aggregator-first restart. GREEN: active/active, dash 200, schema 63 (migration log), boundaries 1/1/5, leak 0. NO docker check declared — the claude user lacks docker-socket permission (check_docker would degrade to ServiceStatus::Unknown / no native row; verified benign, not deployed).
hosts.linode-vm: labelwatch -> nq.neutral.zone (PUBLIC). ON-HOST build (glibc 2.35, 64s). rsync --exclude runs/.git/.governor/.claude/target (LAN lease receipts kept off public box — confirmed runs/ absent post-rsync). stop both -> backup(nq.db.pre-schema63-* + binaries) -> swap -> start nq-serve (migrated 60->63) -> start nq-publish (aggregator-first). GREEN: active/active, local dash 200, schema 63 (PRAGMA user_version), boundaries 1/1/4, leak 0; PUBLIC https://nq.neutral.zone 200. Docker worked-example (VM config already declared driftwatch/caddy/pds as check_type=docker; old schema-60 binary produced ZERO docker rows — newly lit up): driftwatch running+healthy (has HEALTHCHECK), caddy running+NULL (no HEALTHCHECK), pds running+NULL (no HEALTHCHECK) — demonstrates the no-healthcheck sub_state=NULL path on the public box, complementing sushi-k's healthy path. Docker vocabulary quoted verbatim; no synthesized analogs.

verify_each: dashboard HTTP 200; render boundaries present; leak language 0 (P1/neglected/proven correct/192.168.68/dmz.spooky all 0); schema 63 (PRAGMA user_version on sushi-k+VM; migration log on NAS); clean migration logs (applying 61,62,63 -> complete version=63). VM also verified PUBLIC https://nq.neutral.zone 200. Docker-native rows verified per-host against actual container health.
